name: Organic Bananas (Bunch)
description: Certified organic bananas grown without synthetic pesticides or fertilisers. Naturally sweet, energy-packed, and perfectly ripened for eating fresh, blending into smoothies, or baking.

specifications.value: Room temperature; keep away from direct sunlight

additionalInfo.value: Eating fresh, smoothies, baking, oatmeal topping

reviews.title: Perfect sweetness every time
reviews.reviewText: These bananas arrive at just the right ripeness and taste noticeably sweeter than the conventional ones I used to buy. Highly recommend going organic for bananas!

reviews.title: Great for smoothies
reviews.reviewText: I buy these every week for my morning smoothies. Consistent quality, delivered fresh, and the organic certification gives me peace of mind.

reviews.title: Good quality, slightly pricier
reviews.reviewText: A little more expensive than supermarket bananas but the quality and taste justify the cost. Will keep ordering.

reviews.title: Kids love them
reviews.reviewText: My kids refuse to eat any other bananas now. They can definitely taste the difference between these and the regular ones from the store.

reviews.title: Reliable and fresh
reviews.reviewText: Arrived well-packed and in perfect condition. The bunch was a good size. Docked one star only because two bananas were slightly bruised, but the rest were flawless.
